title: carduus candicans subsp. candicans
intro: Carduus candicans subsp. candicans, also known as the Globe Artichoke Thistle or Artichoke Thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, indigestion, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Carduus candicans subsp. candicans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall health and well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and create a range of herbal preparations.
